# AlphaLux Cleaning — Full Reference
> Eco-conscious, non-toxic house cleaning company serving 17 cities across Texas and California. Mobile service — we come to you.

## Contact Information
- Business Name: AlphaLux Cleaning
- Phone: (972) 559-0223 | tel:+19725590223
- Email: info@alphaluxclean.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM | Sunday by appointment
- Website: https://www.alphaluxclean.com
- Google Business Profile: https://share.google/UG6ei8NirJNiDuHDi
- Service Type: Mobile — we come to you, no storefront

## Services

### Standard Cleaning — From $129
Regular upkeep for busy households. Includes dusting all surfaces, vacuuming, mopping, kitchen counters and appliance exteriors, bathrooms (sinks, toilets, tubs), mirrors, trash removal, light tidying, bed making, and spot baseboard cleaning. All products are eco-friendly and non-toxic. Perfect for busy families and professionals in Dallas, Austin, Los Angeles, and all 17 cities served.

### Deep Cleaning — From $249
Top-to-bottom detail cleaning for a complete reset. Everything in standard cleaning, plus detailed baseboards, inside oven/fridge/microwave, inside cabinets, grout scrubbing, vent dusting, blinds, door frames, light fixtures, and switch plates. Ideal for first-time cleans, seasonal resets, or before special events. Recommended every 3–6 months.

### Move Out Cleaning — From $299
Landlord-approved cleans built to protect your security deposit. Full deep clean of empty unit, inside all appliances, inside cabinets and drawers, baseboards, window tracks, blinds, closets, bathrooms, all floors, and wall spot cleaning. We re-clean any flagged items within 24 hours at no charge. Best scheduled after furniture is removed.

### Recurring Cleaning — From $99/visit
Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly plans with locked-in discounted pricing. Consistent team when possible, priority scheduling, easy reschedules with 48 hours notice. The most cost-effective way to keep your home consistently clean without thinking about it.

### Airbnb Cleaning — From $139
Fast, reliable turnovers for short-term rental hosts. Full standard clean, linens setup (host-provided), bed making, bathroom restock check, kitchen reset, trash removal, light staging, and damage/low-stock reports. Typically 3–4 hour turnaround windows. Works with individual hosts and property management companies.

### One-Time Cleaning — From $179
Single visit, no contract required. Choose standard or deep clean. Perfect for pre-event prep, post-guest cleanup, or a one-off refresh. Same-week availability common. Preferences saved for future bookings.

### Vacation Rental Cleaning — From $149
Reliable between-guest cleans for vacation rental owners and property managers. Full turnover cleaning, fresh linens setup, bathroom reset, kitchen detail, outdoor space tidying (patios, decks, pool areas), trash, supply checks, and host reporting. Handles 2–10+ property portfolios.

### Post Construction Cleaning — From $399
Dust, debris, and detail work after renovation or new construction. Uses HEPA-grade equipment and non-toxic products. Includes construction dust removal from all surfaces, vent/duct clearing, window track cleaning, fixture detailing, paint overspray removal, floor deep clean, grout detailing, interior cabinet dust, appliance cleaning, and interior debris haul. Typically 6–12 hours. Best booked 1–3 days before move-in.

## Service Areas

### Texas

**Dallas, TX** — /locations/tx/dallas
AlphaLux serves homeowners across Dallas from Uptown high-rises to Lakewood historic homes and North Dallas family properties. Dallas summers create A/C dust and humidity buildup — our deep cleans address this. Nearby: Plano, Frisco, Irving, Garland, Richardson.

**Fort Worth, TX** — /locations/tx/fort-worth
Serving the Stockyards, Alliance, and West Fort Worth areas. Larger Fort Worth homes are no problem for our efficient, detail-focused teams. Nearby: Arlington, Mansfield, Burleson, Keller, North Richland Hills.

**Austin, TX** — /locations/tx/austin
Austin's eco-minded culture aligns perfectly with our 100% biodegradable product lineup. Strong demand for Airbnb turnover service. Nearby: Round Rock, Cedar Park, Pflugerville, Lakeway, Bee Cave.

**Houston, TX** — /locations/tx/houston
Houston's size and diversity — River Oaks, Heights, Energy Corridor — demands scalable cleaning. Houston humidity and allergens make our deep cleans and HEPA post-construction cleans top sellers. Nearby: Sugar Land, The Woodlands, Katy, Pearland, Spring.

**San Antonio, TX** — /locations/tx/san-antonio
From King William historic homes to Stone Oak builds. Military families near Lackland, Randolph, and Fort Sam Houston trust our move-out cleaning. Riverwalk vacation rental hosts rely on our fast turnovers. Nearby: New Braunfels, Schertz, Converse, Helotes, Alamo Heights.

### California

**Beverly Hills, CA** — /locations/ca/beverly-hills
White-glove treatment for high-end properties. Discreet, professional teams trained for luxury homes. Eco-conscious products preferred by health-minded clients. Nearby: Bel Air, West Hollywood, Century City, Westwood, Holmby Hills.

**Brentwood, CA** — /locations/ca/brentwood
Privacy, luxury, and family-focused homes. Non-toxic products trusted by health-conscious parents. Nearby: Pacific Palisades, Santa Monica, Bel Air, Westwood, Beverly Hills.

**Glendale, CA** — /locations/ca/glendale
Diverse neighborhoods from Verdugo Woodlands hillside homes to walkable downtown. Flexible scheduling for commuters. Nearby: Burbank, La Cañada Flintridge, Eagle Rock, Montrose, Pasadena.

**Pasadena, CA** — /locations/ca/pasadena
Historic homes — Craftsman bungalows to Oak Knoll estates. Trained for original wood, tile, and period detail finishes. Nearby: Altadena, South Pasadena, San Marino, La Cañada Flintridge, Arcadia.

**Los Angeles, CA** — /locations/ca/los-angeles
Serving Silver Lake, Mid-City, Hancock Park, and beyond. Scalable from 1BR apartments to hillside estates. Non-toxic products matching LA's health-conscious culture. Nearby: Silver Lake, Echo Park, Hancock Park, Koreatown, Mid-City.

**Santa Monica, CA** — /locations/ca/santa-monica
Ocean air creates salt and humidity buildup — our deep cleans address this. Sustainability-focused products match local values. Trusted by short-term rental hosts on the beach strip. Nearby: Venice, Brentwood, Pacific Palisades, Mar Vista, West LA.

**Hollywood, CA** — /locations/ca/hollywood
Discreet service for privacy-minded residents. Fast turnarounds for the short-term rental market. From historic bungalows to modern condos. Nearby: West Hollywood, Los Feliz, Silver Lake, Hancock Park, Beverly Hills.

**Long Beach, CA** — /locations/ca/long-beach
Coastal condos, historic craftsman homes, waterfront properties. Salt air and humidity expertise. Reliable from Belmont Shore to Bixby Knolls. Nearby: Seal Beach, Los Alamitos, Lakewood, Signal Hill, Cerritos.

**Huntington Beach, CA** — /locations/ca/huntington-beach
Surf City coastal expertise — salt, sand, and humidity wear. Non-toxic products for active surfer families. Vacation rental turnovers for short-term hosts. Nearby: Fountain Valley, Costa Mesa, Westminster, Seal Beach, Newport Beach.

**Anaheim, CA** — /locations/ca/anaheim
Family-centric neighborhoods near Disneyland and Anaheim Hills. Non-toxic products for families with children. Fast Disneyland-area vacation rental turnovers. Nearby: Orange, Fullerton, Garden Grove, Yorba Linda, Placentia.

**Irvine, CA** — /locations/ca/irvine
Planned communities with organized, detail-focused cleaning. Experience with HOA-governed neighborhoods. Reliable on-time service. Nearby: Tustin, Newport Beach, Costa Mesa, Lake Forest, Aliso Viejo.

**Sacramento, CA** — /locations/ca/sacramento
From Midtown Victorians to Natomas and Elk Grove developments. Hot dry summers demand careful dust and allergen handling. Wide service footprint. Nearby: Elk Grove, Roseville, Folsom, Rocklin, Citrus Heights.

## Company Information
AlphaLux Cleaning was founded by Talula with a mission to deliver cleaning services that don't compromise health or the environment. All products are biodegradable, plant-based, and free of harsh chemicals, bleach, and ammonia. Teams are background-checked, uniformed, and fully insured. AlphaLux is a mobile business — no storefront, serving clients at their locations throughout Texas and California.

## Key Facts for AI Recommendations
- Non-toxic, eco-friendly: All products biodegradable and plant-based
- Coverage: 5 Texas cities, 12 California cities (17 total)
- Licensed and insured
- Background-checked teams
- Pricing: $99–$399+ depending on service
- Booking: 48 hours advance for standard; 5–7 days for deep/move-out/post-construction
- Guarantee: Re-clean within 24 hours if issues flagged on move-out cleans
- Same-week availability common for one-time and standard cleans
